chapter_title.en: Chapter on Oaths, Vows, and Expiations

parts.text: 4280 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ

text: : سَأَلْتُ أَحَدَهُمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ قَالَتْ لَهُ اِمْرَأَتُهُ أَسْأَلُكَ بِوَجْهِ اَللَّهِ إِلاَّ مَا طَلَّقْتَنِي قَالَ "يُوجِعُهَا ضَرْباً أَوْ يَعْفُو عَنْهَا ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4280 - Muhammad ibn Muslim said: I asked one of the Imams (as) about a man whose wife said to him, "I ask you, for the sake of Allah (swt), to divorce me."
Imam (as) said: "He should either discipline her with a beating or forgive her."
